config.user_instruction: Safely pick up the blue cube and put it on the red cube. Keep a generous distance from the moving obstacle.

grasp_model: fixed PyBullet constraint after gripper closure

trajectory_legend.yellow_dashed: active OD-CBF safety boundary h=0 (not a trajectory)

language_control_boundary: Validated TP/OD JSON selects the pick/place macro and bounded MPC-CBF parameters; the trusted executor expands motion stages and MPC-CBF computes the trajectory
